tracks.meaning: fine particles of matter such as soil, sand, or powder suspended in or settling from the air
to cover or sprinkle something with a fine powder or particulate substance
fine sedimentary particles smaller than sand, typically composed of minerals and rock fragments
a fine powder applied to the skin, typically for cosmetic or medicinal purposes
fine particles of dirt or debris that accumulate on surfaces or floors
to kill or eliminate someone or something, often used in slang
fine particles of matter scattered in space between stars
a fine solid powder produced from the breakdown or grinding of a substance
fine particles that can be inhaled, potentially causing respiratory irritation or disease
to scatter or disperse something into fine particles
